variants.tagline: Timeless Tone. Modern Soul. Midnight Black.
variants.creative_direction: Place the midnight-black YG-100 upright against the dark studio wall, bathed in warm amber side light that rakes across the hardwood floor. Golden hour glow halos the body, deepening its obsidian finish while long soft shadows anchor it in quiet, cinematic permanence.

variants.tagline: Built for the Stage. Born for the Moment.
variants.creative_direction: Floor-level wide shot captures the YG-200 Pro's midnight-black finish absorbing deep crimson backlight at stage edge. Cool blue haze drifts across the vast dark arena. The guitar anchors left frame—sharp, sovereign—as blurred crowd lights dissolve into infinite darkness behind it.

variants.tagline: Precision Meets Passion. Nothing Between You and the Note.
variants.cta: Play the YG-300. Feel the Difference.
variants.creative_direction: Midnight-black YG-300 emerges from near-black void, single 15° raking light carving a razor edge along the body. Deep crimson accent bleeds into shadow. Polished surface mirrors the guitar's silhouette below. Intense, still, inevitable.

variants.tagline: Where notes become music. Nothing in between.
variants.creative_direction: Position the ebony YP-100 at the edge of the warm spotlight pool, its lacquered black surface mirroring the dark hardwood floor. Let deep shadow swallow the room's edges, isolating the piano in a single breath of amber light.

variants.tagline: The Sound of Mastery. The Feel of Forever.
variants.creative_direction: Place the ebony YP-200 Grand at room center, candlelight pooling across its lacquered lid. Deep burgundy walls and carved dark panelling frame it in old-world reverence. Warm gold reflections bleed across parquet floor, shadows amplifying the piano's commanding presence.
variants.scene_direction: {"scene": "Abstract painterly gradient from deep burgundy to warm gold, rich and velvety", "style": "fine art color field painting rendered photographically, ultra smooth", "color_palette": ["#4A1A0A", "#8B2020", "#8B6914", "#C8A830"], "lighting": "no directional light source, pure color field — deep burgundy #4A1A0A at edges transitioning through crimson #8B2020 to warm gold #C8A830 at center, even luminous glow", "mood": "opulent, masterful, old world", "background": "seamless color gradient field, no objects, no texture, no architecture, pure color", "composition": "radial gradient, gold center, burgundy perimeter, fills entire frame", "camera": {"angle": "flat", "lens": "85mm", "depth_of_field": "infinite"}}

variants.tagline: Crafted for the World Stage.
variants.creative_direction: Place the ebony YP-300 alone under a single overhead spotlight on a vast, dark concert stage. Warm gold edges kiss its lacquered finish. The empty auditorium recedes into shadow—seats, balconies, silence—amplifying its monumental presence.

variants.tagline: Soul in Every Note. Gold in Every Curve.
variants.creative_direction: Amber spotlight cuts through jazz club smoke, catching the YS-100's gold lacquer in a warm #F5C842 glow against dark brick. Leica 35mm at f/1.4 — instrument sharp, haze dreamy, shadows deep. Soulful. Alive.
variants.scene_direction: {"scene": "Late night jazz club interior, atmospheric and smoky", "style": "documentary night photography, shot on Leica M11, 35mm Summilux, f/1.4", "color_palette": ["#B01020", "#8B6914", "#1A0A08", "#F5C842"], "lighting": "single amber spotlight from above creating warm pool in smoke-filled air, light scattering through haze in gold tones #F5C842, dark brick wall behind, deep warm shadows", "mood": "soulful, late-night, smoky, jazz", "background": "dark exposed brick wall, atmospheric smoke haze catching amber light, dark wooden floor, intimate club darkness", "composition": "centered amber light pool, brick wall texture visible, atmospheric depth with smoke", "camera": {"angle": "eye level", "lens": "35mm Summilux", "depth_of_field": "soft, dreamy bokeh in background smoke"}}
